title: Anvil Player Heads
description: Simple server-side mod allowing for adjustment of player heads to be specific usernames!
body:
# Anvil Player Heads

A mod that allows for the ability to rename Player Heads within anvils to the specific Username.

Mod based on LukeGrahamLandry [Anvil Player Heads](https://github.com/crimulus/anvil-player-heads)

Commissioned by [crimulus](https://github.com/crimulus)
